data.title: Shiba Inu burn rate drops 50% — analyst predicts 300% surge by May
data.description:
Shiba Inu's burn rate has dropped by 50% in the past 24 hours, but analysts remain bullish, predicting a 300% surge by May if key technical patterns hold.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/shiba-inu-burn-rate-drops-50-but-analyst-predicts-300-surge-by-may

data.title: Bitcoin sell pressure could ramp up after 49.7K BTC onchain move
data.description:
Bitcoin price could drop under $94,000 again as crypto market sentiment turns negative for the first time since November 2024.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-sell-pressure-could-ramp-up-after-49-7-k-btc-onchain-move?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Public Citizen accuses Trump of ‘soliciting’ gifts with memecoin posts
data.description:
Though Donald Trump launched his memecoin before taking office, he has called on his social media followers to buy it after Jan. 20.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/public-citizen-donald-trump-soliciting-gifts-memecoins?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ethereum, Solana and XRP Likely Forming Reversals, According to Crypto Analyst Jason Pizzino
data.description:

source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/05/ethereum-solana-and-xrp-likely-forming-reversals-according-to-crypto-analyst-jason-pizzino/

Token-Powered Gas Fees Ease Ethereum Transaction Hurdles
data.description:
Ethereum users have long struggled with failed transactions due to insufficient ETH for gas fees. On February 4, MetaMask introduced its new Gas Station feature to tackle this common issue. The update allows users to pay gas fees using select tokens rather than relying solely on ETH. This move comes as Ethereum faces increased network […]
The post Token-Powered Gas Fees Ease Ethereum...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/05/token-powered-gas-fees-ease-ethereum-transaction-hurdles/

data.title: How Trump's Trade War Is Affecting Bitcoin and Gold
data.description:
Gold and Bitcoin have previously moved together as "safe haven" assets. But that isn't the case with President Donald Trump back in action.
source: https://decrypt.co/304583/trump-trade-war-affecting-bitcoin-gold
